title: Create Metropolis
description: Create with addons and every thing you need to build a metropolis.
body:
## CM (Create Metropolis)
Create Metropolis is a modpack that has its origins in a Minecraft server. The goal of the modpack is, as the name implies, to build a big city. Of course, you can also build all forms of cities or do something entirely different.

### Season 2
Best enjoyed with [JJThunder To The Max](https://modrinth.com/datapack/jjthunder-to-the-max).

## Mods
All this is then combined with the many mods that can be found in this modpack.
- **Create + Addons**: We have [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric) with which you can, for example, build a subway or a city wall gate in a mobile and impressive way. Of course, an industrial area should not be missing in a city. Automation is then used to produce your items there.
- **Deco Mods**: These items can then be used to build houses and enlivened with the decoration from the added decoration mods.
- **Multiplayer Mods**: For even more fun, there are also mods like [SimpelVoiceChat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat) or [Immersive Melodies](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-melodies) to talk to each other or play music.

<details>
  <summary>Version numbering</summary>
If you noticed something strange in the version numbering, then let me explain it.

- ### Alpha
  not suited for server because the modpack will be changed frequently and can break.
  A.x.y.z:
  - x = Mod Season. That means that this is one mod combination in a specific minecraft version. As an example, the Season 1 modpack could have a different world gen, other Decorative Mods and is in a different minecraft version.
  - y = the number of updates
  - z = What was changed:
    - M mods added
    - m mods deleted
    - U updated the modloader
    - u updated all mods
    - Y(es)/N(o) Breaks the game or not
- ### Beta
  suited for server, but features could get removed or added that don't break the game
  B.x.y.z:
  - all above, but not Y(es)/N(o)
- ### Release
  this version gets only mod updates
  x.y
  - the above for x and y
</details>
